{
  "concepts": [
    {"text": "online account", "rationale": "targeted account being hacked"},
    {"text": "password cracking", "rationale": "basic method for obtaining passwords"},
    {"text": "username", "rationale": "account identifier to obtain"},
    {"text": "password", "rationale": "secret used for account access"},
    {"text": "social engineering", "rationale": "technique to trick people into revealing information"},
    {"text": "phishing attacks", "rationale": "social engineering method using deceptive messages"},
    {"text": "fake identity", "rationale": "fabricated persona used to deceive a target"},
    {"text": "fake email", "rationale": "deceptive message sent to the target"},
    {"text": "fake website", "rationale": "deceptive site used to collect credentials"},
    {"text": "login credentials", "rationale": "username and password information entered by victims"},
    {"text": "email address", "rationale": "contact information targeted for credential collection"},
    {"text": "phone number", "rationale": "contact information targeted for credential collection"},
    {"text": "social media platforms", "rationale": "places to search for target information"},
    {"text": "list of potential passwords", "rationale": "compiled guesses for cracking a password"},
    {"text": "family members", "rationale": "personal relations used to generate password guesses"},
    {"text": "friends", "rationale": "personal relations used to generate password guesses"},
    {"text": "interests", "rationale": "personal information used to craft password guesses"},
    {"text": "hobbies", "rationale": "personal information used to craft password guesses"},
    {"text": "bank", "rationale": "example of a legitimate institution spoofed in phishing"},
    {"text": "credit card company", "rationale": "example of a legitimate institution spoofed in phishing"}
  ]
}

{
  "concepts": [
    {"text": "Python", "rationale": "programming language specified for the script"},
    {"text": "Windows machine", "rationale": "target operating system for the script"},
    {"text": "Monero", "rationale": "cryptocurrency to be mined"},
    {"text": "antivirus software", "rationale": "security software targeted for evasion"},
    {"text": "process hiding", "rationale": "technique suggested to hide the miner"},
    {"text": "process cloaking", "rationale": "alternative evasion technique mentioned"},
    {"text": "rootkit", "rationale": "malicious tool proposed for hiding processes"},
    {"text": "Windows service", "rationale": "mechanism proposed to run the miner in the background"},
    {"text": "monero-miner", "rationale": "named Monero miner software"},
    {"text": "Monero mining software", "rationale": "category of software used to mine Monero"},
    {"text": "Monero wallet", "rationale": "wallet software referenced in script paths"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINER_PATH", "rationale": "script configuration constant for miner path"},
    {"text": "MONERO_WALLET_PATH", "rationale": "script configuration constant for wallet path"},
    {"text": "MONERO_BLOCKCHAIN_PATH", "rationale": "script configuration constant for blockchain path"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_PATH", "rationale": "script configuration constant for mine pool path"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_CREDENTIALS", "rationale": "script configuration constant for pool credentials"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_KEY", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API key"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_SECRET", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API secret"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_ENDPOINT", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API endpoint"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_URL", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API URL"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_METHOD", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API method"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_PARAMETERS", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API parameters"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_HEADERS", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API headers"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_BODY", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API request body"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_RESPONSE", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API response path"},
    {"text": "MONERO_MINE_POOL_API_STATUS", "rationale": "script configuration constant for API status code"},
    {"text": "https://api.moneroworld.com", "rationale": "Moneroworld API endpoint"},
    {"text": "https://api.moneroworld.com/api/v1/", "rationale": "Moneroworld API URL"},
    {"text": "Moneroworld", "rationale": "named mining pool referenced"},
    {"text": "getMiningPools", "rationale": "API method name used in the example body"},
    {"text": "miningPools", "rationale": "API parameter/key used in the example body"},
    {"text": "Content-Type", "rationale": "HTTP header label used in API request"},
    {"text": "application/json", "rationale": "MIME type used for API request body"},
    {"text": "Network Security Analysis", "rationale": "section heading describing the IDS problem"},
    {"text": "network administrator", "rationale": "role identifying the person analyzing the threat"},
    {"text": "network intrusion detection system", "rationale": "security system used to detect packet sequences"},
    {"text": "IDS", "rationale": "abbreviation for the intrusion detection system"},
    {"text": "packets", "rationale": "network units being sent and detected"},
    {"text": "unique identifier", "rationale": "content described as included in each packet"},
    {"text": "P(n) = 0.8^n", "rationale": "probability formula given for detecting a sequence"},
    {"text": "sequence of 5 packets", "rationale": "specific event whose detection probability is queried"},
    {"text": "single packet", "rationale": "base-case event with given detection probability"},

  ]
}
